name: Calm Emotions
description: Each Humanoid in a 20-foot-radius Sphere makes a Charisma saving throw or is affected by one of: Immunity to (and suppression of) the Charmed and Frightened conditions; or becoming Indifferent toward chosen creatures it's Hostile to. Engine: the CHA save is rolled per target; the emotion-suppression/indifference outcome is descriptive only.
